summary: Excellent Winterland audience capture with crystal‑clear levels and a memorable end‑of‑Cassidy crowd moment.
review: Both reviewers rave about the sound, noting it beats the well‑known Holwein tape with good levels and only low hiss, putting you right on the floor of Winterland. The performance shines – especially the pre‑drums section of set 2 – and even the post‑Cassidy audience banter adds to the live feel. Overall the recording is clean, complete, and highly enjoyable.

ai_rating.rationale: Two consistent 5‑star reviews highlight superb performance and high‑quality audio; with limited review count confidence is medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Better than the Holwein tape, complete set, good levels, low hiss; captures floor ambience and crowd chatter.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Strong second set with a notable pre‑drums segment; the show maintains energy throughout and ends with an entertaining audience conversation after Cassidy.
